tests.procedure: Trace every feasibility, finance, risk, evidence, AI, decision, and export request
tests.expected: Every trace uses an approved Contract, Socket Contract Layer, APP, System Bus, and governed target Socket

tests.procedure: Static-scan frontend imports and runtime network calls
tests.expected: No financial formula, source validation, database access, report calculation, or AI-provider call exists in frontend

tests.requirement: No business logic in Kernel, Hearts, Bus Controller, System Bus, or Socket Contract Layer
tests.procedure: Inspect affected component dependencies and code ownership
tests.expected: Feasibility logic exists only inside approved functional Module boundaries

tests.procedure: Inspect manifests and runtime layout
tests.expected: Frontend is React, TypeScript, Vite, pnpm; Python is backend-only

tests.requirement: No implementation technology becomes ASIE authority
tests.procedure: Inspect architecture documentation and adapters
tests.expected: Providers, queues, Redis, database, API framework, and AI remain behind Contracts

tests.requirement: Legal form, enterprise size, project complexity, and subscription remain independent
tests.procedure: Route a small LLC with a capital-intensive regulated project
tests.expected: Advanced or Institutional depth is selected despite small enterprise size

tests.requirement: Location is collected before detailed analysis
tests.procedure: Start a new project without country and city/market scope
tests.expected: Detailed model routing and final analysis are blocked

tests.requirement: Subscription cannot silently reduce required rigor
tests.procedure: Submit an Institutional-depth project under BASIC entitlement
tests.expected: Result is PRELIMINARY_ONLY, critical warnings remain visible, FINAL_FEASIBILITY is blocked

tests.procedure: Compare restaurant, software, and manufacturing routed schedules
tests.expected: Each route activates materially different technical and operating schedules

tests.requirement: Saudi rules are not a GCC default
tests.procedure: Change jurisdiction from SA to a GCC country without an approved country pack
tests.expected: Regulatory calculation is blocked with COUNTRY_RULE_PACK_UNAVAILABLE

tests.procedure: Compute 0.1 + 0.2 and aggregate repeated fractional currency amounts
tests.expected: Exact decimal result is preserved internally and rounding occurs only at presentation

tests.requirement: Effective monthly rate conversion is correct
tests.procedure: Convert 12 percent annual effective rate to monthly
tests.expected: Result equals 0.009488792934583046 within configured decimal tolerance, not 0.01

tests.procedure: Calculate NPV for [-1000, 400, 400, 400] at 10 percent per period
tests.expected: NPV equals -5.259203606311189 within configured decimal tolerance

tests.procedure: Attempt to discount nominal FCFF with a real discount rate
tests.expected: Calculation fails with CASH_FLOW_DISCOUNT_BASIS_MISMATCH

tests.requirement: Project and equity cash flows are separate
tests.procedure: Add a debt draw to a funded project
tests.expected: Debt draw changes equity financing cash flow but not FCFF project cash flow

tests.procedure: Calculate IRR for [-100, 230, -132]
tests.expected: System reports multiple valid roots near 10 percent and 20 percent, marks headline IRR ambiguous, and does not select one silently

tests.procedure: Calculate MIRR for [-1000, 400, 400, 400] with 10 percent finance and reinvestment rates
tests.expected: MIRR equals 0.09806823486065386 within configured tolerance

tests.procedure: Use fixed cash cost 100000 and weighted contribution margin ratio 0.40
tests.expected: Break-even revenue equals 250000

tests.procedure: Asset cost 100000, residual 10000, useful life 5 years, full-year basis
tests.expected: Annual depreciation equals 18000 and begins only on in-service date

tests.requirement: Lease cost is not double counted
tests.procedure: Activate applicable right-of-use accounting for a lease
tests.expected: Accounting expense classification changes correctly while actual cash payments appear once in cash flow

tests.requirement: VAT is not treated automatically as revenue or cost
tests.procedure: Run recoverable, nonrecoverable, exempt, and unregistered cases
tests.expected: Each case follows the effective-dated approved rule and no VAT amount is duplicated

tests.requirement: Loaded payroll includes all applicable employer cost
tests.procedure: Run a role with allowances, employer burdens, recruitment, insurance, and end-of-service
tests.expected: Payroll schedule includes each applicable component once and reconciles to statements

tests.procedure: Compare DSO on credit revenue and DPO on credit purchases
tests.expected: Cash sales and noncredit purchases are excluded from the respective driver calculations

tests.procedure: Introduce a one-riyal imbalance
tests.expected: Final report and Sovereign Verdict are blocked with FINANCIAL_RECONCILIATION_FAILED

tests.procedure: Compare opening cash plus CFO, CFI, and CFF to closing cash
tests.expected: Equality holds at full precision for every period

tests.procedure: Run drawdown, grace period, capitalized interest, principal, and balloon payment
tests.expected: Opening debt plus movements equals closing debt for every period and DSCR uses the approved contract definition

tests.requirement: Monthly liquidity is not hidden by annual profit
tests.procedure: Create a profitable annual case with a cash deficit in month four
tests.expected: Dashboard shows funding gap/cash-shortfall warning and does not classify liquidity as healthy

tests.procedure: Run the same approved input snapshot twice
tests.expected: All deterministic schedule outputs and output hashes are identical

tests.procedure: Evaluate a project before and after a rule effective-date boundary
tests.expected: Correct version is applied and authority/source are included in lineage

tests.procedure: Use an expired material rule without approved successor or human exception
tests.expected: Final regulatory calculation is blocked with SA_RULE_PACK_STALE

tests.requirement: Enterprise-size classification is versioned and source-backed
tests.procedure: Classify boundary cases using employee and revenue inputs and inspect rule lineage
tests.expected: The effective Saudi classification rule, source, conflict handling, and result reason are recorded; no UI constant is authoritative

tests.requirement: Employment obligations use the applicable effective-dated rule
tests.procedure: Run employee-cost and end-of-service cases across entity, worker, and date profiles
tests.expected: Applicable rule versions and inputs are traceable and no universal fixed percentage is applied

tests.requirement: ASIE does not claim government approval without exact proof
tests.procedure: Generate a report from official Saudi data without an official project approval record
tests.expected: Report cites official sources but does not label the project or ASIE model as government approved

tests.procedure: Remove the source from a material revenue or CapEx assumption
tests.expected: Evidence coverage falls, warning is visible, and final status follows materiality policy

tests.procedure: Attach a McKinsey global benchmark from another sector or geography
tests.expected: Benchmark is not applied until applicability and limitations are reviewed

tests.requirement: Research does not override Saudi authority
tests.procedure: Provide a global source that conflicts with a current Saudi official rule
tests.expected: Saudi official rule controls the regulatory claim and conflict is logged

tests.procedure: Attempt unlicensed ingestion or reproduction of proprietary survey questions or benchmark database
tests.expected: Request is blocked and audited

tests.procedure: Run a prototype project using mock source adapters
tests.expected: UI and every report show DEMO_DATA and do not claim official/live/verified status

tests.requirement: Monte Carlo headline is always present
tests.procedure: Open any project overview
tests.expected: KPI shows a calculated value, RUNNING, or NOT_READY with reason; it is never silently absent

tests.procedure: Inspect Arabic and English labels
tests.expected: Label means probability of passing feasibility gates, never unconditional project success probability

tests.requirement: All-pass and no-pass gate arithmetic is correct
tests.procedure: Run controlled fixtures where all valid simulations pass, then none pass
tests.expected: KPI equals 1.0 then 0.0 exactly

tests.procedure: Run a project without debt
tests.expected: DSCR gate is NOT_APPLICABLE and is excluded from denominator and pass logic

tests.procedure: Submit a distribution without evidence or human approval
tests.expected: Simulation is blocked with STOCHASTIC_INPUT_NOT_APPROVED

tests.procedure: Submit a nonsymmetric or non-positive-semidefinite matrix
tests.expected: Simulation is blocked with CORRELATION_MATRIX_INVALID

tests.procedure: Run identical simulation snapshot twice with identical engine and seed
tests.expected: Samples, percentiles, KPI, drivers, and output hash are identical

tests.procedure: Run an intentionally unstable tail fixture at minimum iterations
tests.expected: Engine continues within policy or returns MONTE_CARLO_NOT_CONVERGED with visible warning

tests.procedure: Inspect NPV and cost/funding percentile displays
tests.expected: P10/P50/P90 definitions and better/worse direction are labelled without ambiguity

tests.procedure: Attempt to persist AI-proposed distribution or correlation as approved
tests.expected: Write is rejected until evidence or authorized human approval exists

tests.procedure: Attempt to run Technical Auditor before Business Advisor
tests.expected: Sequence request is rejected

tests.procedure: Inject another persona output into a persona context
tests.expected: Run is blocked with PERSONA_ISOLATION_VIOLATION and audited

tests.procedure: Ask an AI persona to change its KPI score
tests.expected: Score remains unchanged and AI response can only explain or challenge

tests.procedure: Remove judgement, evidence, confidence explanation, metric, next action, or change condition
tests.expected: Output becomes invalid and sequence cannot complete

tests.requirement: Sovereign Verdict requires all five valid runs
tests.procedure: Request verdict with four personas or one invalid schema
tests.expected: Verdict is blocked with SOVEREIGN_VERDICT_PRECONDITION_FAILED

tests.procedure: Create three positive and two negative persona judgements
tests.expected: Deterministic rule trace evaluates conditions and blockers; no majority count decides result

tests.procedure: Attempt to persist an AI-generated final verdict without deterministic synthesis
tests.expected: Request is rejected and audited as AI_DECISIVE_NUMBER_ATTEMPT or authority violation

tests.procedure: Render project overview on desktop and mobile
tests.expected: Sovereign Verdict, Monte Carlo, Evidence Confidence, five persona KPIs, and five-to-seven adaptive KPIs are visible without large tables or long narrative

tests.requirement: Permanent persona KPIs are never silently absent
tests.procedure: Open project before, during, and after persona execution
tests.expected: Each persona shows PENDING, RUNNING, value, ERROR, or NOT_APPLICABLE with reason

tests.procedure: Open every KPI detail
tests.expected: User can reach formula/definition, source schedule, assumptions, evidence, snapshot, and warnings

tests.requirement: Project Workspace is one click away
tests.procedure: Navigate from overview to market, technical, financial, risk, personas, evidence, and reports
tests.expected: Every destination is directly available and preserves project context

tests.procedure: View the same critical cash-shortfall project under all tiers
tests.expected: Critical warning, funding gap, Monte Carlo status, persona KPI statuses, and block reason remain visible

tests.requirement: All formats use one immutable snapshot
tests.procedure: Generate UI, Excel, PDF, and PowerPoint outputs
tests.expected: All carry the same snapshot, calculation, formula, rule, evidence, Monte Carlo, persona, and verdict identifiers

tests.procedure: Trace report generation and change local spreadsheet recalculation settings
tests.expected: Authoritative values remain snapshot values and report manifest still reconciles

tests.requirement: Excel contains professional schedules and checks
tests.procedure: Generate Excel for each depth level
tests.expected: Required routed schedules, formulas/references, evidence, and reconciliation tabs exist without unsupported sections

tests.procedure: Render the first three slides
tests.expected: KPIs, Sovereign Verdict, Monte Carlo, and five persona indicators precede detailed narrative

tests.procedure: Generate a preliminary and a final report
tests.expected: Status, evidence quality, assumptions, limitations, mock labels, and unresolved risks are explicit

tests.requirement: Every report format carries the permanent decision KPIs
tests.procedure: Generate Excel, PDF, and PowerPoint for a completed project
tests.expected: Each format includes Sovereign Verdict, Monte Carlo headline, all five persona KPIs, and the routed project KPI summary from the same snapshot

tests.procedure: Request another tenant's project snapshot
tests.expected: Request is denied and audited without data leakage

tests.procedure: Inspect browser network requests and bundled code
tests.expected: No provider URL, API key, or provider SDK call exists in browser

tests.procedure: Trace routing, finance, evidence, risk, personas, verdict, and report generation
tests.expected: Correlation, causation, Contract, Socket, subject, project, decision, versions, timestamps, and error fields are recoverable

tests.procedure: Attempt to mutate an input, evidence, calculation, Monte Carlo, persona, or report snapshot after finalization
tests.expected: Mutation is denied; a new version/snapshot is required
